info.description:
REST API for managing Courses, Chapters and Lessons in the LMS platform.
All mutating endpoints (POST/PUT/DELETE) emit structured logs via logrus.
Errors are returned in a unified shape: {"error":{"code":"...","message":"..."}}.
info.title: LMS Main Service API

post.description:
Exchanges username and password for a JWT access token (5 min)
and a refresh token (168 h), both issued by Keycloak.

put.description:
Changes the authenticated user's password. The current
password must be supplied and is verified first.

401.description: Missing token or wrong current password

put.description:
Updates the authenticated user's email and name. Roles cannot
be changed here — only an admin can assign roles.

post.description:
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access/refresh token
pair. Used when the 5-minute access token expires.

Creates a Keycloak user and assigns a realm role. Requires a
valid token carrying ROLE_ADMIN.
Creates a chapter under an existing course. course_id is required and validated. Requires ROLE_ADMIN.

get.description: Returns a chapter together with its lessons, ordered by lesson.order.

put.description: Updates chapter name, description and order. course_id cannot be changed via PUT. Requires ROLE_ADMIN.

delete.description: Deletes a chapter. All lessons are cascade-deleted. Requires ROLE_ADMIN.

get.description: Returns all lessons of the given chapter, ordered by lesson.order.
Returns a flat list of courses without nested chapters.

post.description: Creates a course. Name length 2..255. Description up to 10000 chars. Requires ROLE_ADMIN.

get.description: Returns a course together with its chapters, ordered by chapter.order.

put.description: Replaces course name and description. Timestamps are preserved. Requires ROLE_ADMIN.

delete.description: Deletes a course. All chapters and lessons are cascade-deleted. Requires ROLE_ADMIN.

get.description: Returns all chapters of the given course, ordered by chapter.order.
Streams the stored file by attachment ID. Requires a valid token (any authenticated user).
Liveness probe. Returns 200 OK when the service is running.

post.description: Creates a lesson under an existing chapter. chapter_id is required and validated. Requires ROLE_ADMIN.

get.description: Returns a single lesson with its full content.

put.description: Updates lesson name, content and order. chapter_id cannot be changed via PUT. Requires ROLE_ADMIN.

delete.description: Deletes a single lesson. Requires ROLE_ADMIN.

get.description: Returns metadata for all files attached to the given lesson.

post.description: Stores a file in MinIO and links it to a lesson. Multipart form: field "file" is the file, "lesson_id" the target lesson. Requires ROLE_ADMIN.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and a JWT access token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
